title: LexemeRef
description: Canonical normalized lexical reference used in ConstructionPlan slot maps and lexical-resolution outputs.

lemma.description: Canonical lemma text for the lexical item. This is the only required field.

lexeme_id.description: Optional stable lexeme identifier from a lexicon source (for example a Wikidata Lexeme ID or local lexicon key).

qid.description: Optional Wikidata QID associated with the lexical meaning or matched concept.

pos.description: Optional part-of-speech hint such as NOUN, ADJ, VERB, or a repository-specific POS label.

surface_hint.description: Optional preferred surface form or display hint for realization.

source.description: Origin of the reference, for example raw_string, shared_lexicon, existing_mapping, or predicate_resolution.

confidence.description: Confidence score assigned by lexical resolution.

features.description: Optional open-ended feature map for inflectional forms, grammar features, GF fun names, source metadata, or other resolver/runtime annotations.
